name: Breaded Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken to an even thickness.
2. Combine milk and flour in a shallow dish; mix well.
3. Dip chicken pieces into egg mixture, then coat with seasoned flour mixture.
4. Place remaining bread crumb coating in another shallow dish.
5. Shake off excess crumbs on each piece.
6. Heat shortening in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 350°F (175°C).
7. Fry chicken in batches until golden brown and cooked through, about 3-4 minutes per side.
8. Drain on absorbent paper.
9. Turn off the heat.
